name: Pirus
description: The Pirus are an umbrella street gang alliance within the larger Bloods alliance, founded in 1969 on Piru Street in Compton, California by Sylvester 'Puddin' Scott and Vincent Benson Owens. Originally called the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods, they formed to resist Crip dominance and allied with the Brims, Bishops, and Denver Lanes to create the Bloods. There are 15 known Piru sets in Greater Los Angeles. Piru sets use burgundy or red bandanas for identification.
